title: bulbophyllum ceriodorum
intro: Bulbophyllum ceriodorum, also known as the golden orchid, is a species of epiphytic orchid native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. Studies have shown that the plant may have health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, teas, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
